---
name: Proposal (Lazy consensus)
about: Propose a change using timeboxed objections
labels: proposal, governance
---

## Proposal
(What change are you proposing?)

## Rationale
(Why is this beneficial?)

## Timebox (required)
- [ ] 72 hours (routine)
- [ ] 7 days (governance / licensing / defensive publication)

**Ends (UTC date/time):** <!-- Replace with actual end date/time in UTC -->

## How to object
Comment with:
1) the specific concern (what breaks / what risk),
2) a concrete alternative or mitigation,
3) whether the objection is blocking or non-blocking.
